trustListId.description: Trust list ID to resolve from the database. When set, frameworkType, value, and verificationMethod are derived automatically.

frameworkType.description: Trust framework type (ignored when trustListId is set)

value.description: URI of the trust list or trust anchor (ignored when trustListId is set)

isLoTE.description: Whether this trust authority is a List of Trusted Entities (LoTE)

verificationMethod.description: Optional verification material for external trusted authorities (for example a JWK). For internal trust-list URLs, EUDIPLO resolves verification material from the database.
